creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

cURL with libssh2 support was never broken *at compile time*; 
it always compiled just fine, it just never ran fine - cURL simply 
could not fetch scp:// or sftp:// URL's. 
Still, I fixed even that in today's update to cURL 7.16.3; and thanks 
for trying to improve things by reporting the compile success :)
